name: insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, manual submission causes delays in claim processing. We automate the conversion of claim forms into digital submissions instead of manual entry of claim forms into digital systems.
problem_solved: Manual submission of claim forms leads to delays in processing.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual submission of claim forms leads to delays in processing.
